en: I... I really have to be somewhere, but it was nice meeting you.
ko: 정말 갈 곳이 있지만, 만나서 반가웠어.

en: Oh, this is excellent. You know, he could have got me a VCR, he could have got me a set of golf clubs,
ko: 버즈는 최고야, 그는 나한테 VCR을 사줄 수도 있었고, 골프채 세트를.

en: but no, he has to get me the woman repeller.
ko: 사줄 수도 있었지만, 아니야, 꼭 나한테.

en: The eyesore from the Liberace house of crap!
ko: 여자를 쫓는 물건, 리버라체의 쓰레기 가게에서 온 흉물.

en: Not that bad. Oh, yeah, easy for you to say.
You don't have to walk around sporting some reject from the Mr. T collection.
ko: 미스터 T의 거절당한 걸 끼고 다니는 거야.

en: I pity the fool who puts on my jewelry. I do! I do!
I pity the fool that... All right.
Hey, man, we were just doing some impressions over here.
Look, it's my best bud. How you doing?
ko: 잘한다. 이봐, 내 가장 친한 친구잖아, 어떻게 지내?

en: Wow, you are really getting good at that Marcel Marceau thing.
ko: 이봐, 농구 좀 할래? 너랑 나, 어때?

en: Hey, listen, what do you say we play some music?
